text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... The younger students have been pestering
me all day, asking where to find you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's the birthday of their pillar of virtue, so I'm
sure they want to celebrate it with a bang again.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored by your kind words... but I feel I
should apologize for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. It's nothing to worry about. Only... Hm,
how should I put this?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ashamed beyond words... Deeply mortified... Hm,
no...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind if you leave it until right before
curfew, but would you come over to the student
council office later? I'll make sure it's unlocked.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand how busy you are, but please—I'd
very much regret not giving you your present
while it's still your birthday.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You can laugh at my inability to remain
composed. You may even scold me for my
selfishness.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of younger students waiting, so
I'm afraid I'll indeed be quite late, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll drop by the office. I promise.
